description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a light wood-grain top and four sturdy, black metal legs. The tabletop has a smooth, flat surface with a natural wood finish, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The legs are slightly angled outward, providing stability and a touch of industrial style. The table's design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or additional features such as drawers or shelves. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for use as a dining table, work table, or communal surface in urban environments like parks, plazas, or public seating areas. The materials and construction indicate durability for frequent use in high-traffic settings.
description: A modern rectangular table with a light wood top and black metal legs, featuring a clean, minimalistic design and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the light wood tabletop and all four black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and the depth of the black metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the tabletop's length and leg placement.
